heroHeadline: Alliance Under Stress: US Conditionality Drives European Strategic Autonomy Push
heroSubtitle: From Trump's 'NATO obsolete' opening to the 5% GDP demand and Article 5 ambiguity at The Hague — tracking eight years of transatlantic friction, European rearmament, and the redefinition of the world's most powerful military alliance
footerNote: Data sourced from NATO HQ, White House, European Commission, CSIS, IISS, Atlantic Council, Politico Europe, Reuters, BBC
